title: cichorium endivia var. pumilum
intro: Cichorium endivia var. pumilum, also known as endive or chicory, is a type of leafy green plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in vitamins and minerals, providing numerous health benefits such as boosting the immune system, improving digestion, and supporting eye health. The leaves can be used fresh in salads or cooked as a vegetable, while the roots can be dried and used in teas or herbal supplements.
